title: Method and system for determining and sharing immediate, synchronous data
abstract: The present invention relates to a method (100) wherein a user can make data entry to the system so as to share a data related to any subject and category; and all data included in the data storage unit (10) are viewed (103) according to the data type by the user or according to the type of non-classified (10a) and classified (10b) data, according to the location wherein the share is performed and/or the surrounding of the said location at a distance preferred by the user and/or according to the time when the data is shared and/or will be carried out, according to the all data unit (111) or the user-based personal selection unit (112) in the data display unit in order to ensure that location of the user entering the data at the moment when s/he shares the data is entered to the system (1) together with data sharing even without being selected by the user and that the data, which are ordered and gathered starting from the most up-to-date share, are viewed by the user entering the data or other users upon they are shared in the system (1) wherein they exist together for a certain period of time synchronously; and a system wherein the said method (100) is applied.
claims: Claims 1- ) A method (100) wherein a user can make data entry to the system so as to share a data related to any subject, category; the entered data is transferred to the data storing unit (10); and all data included in the data storing unit (10) can be viewed by other users; characterized by comprising step of: - the user viewing all data included in the data storage unit ( 10) according to the data type or according to the type of non-classified (10a) and classified (10b) data, according to the location wherein the share is performed and/or the surrounding of the said location at a distance preferred by the user and/or according to the time when the data is shared and/or will be carried out, according to the all data unit (111) or the user-based personal selection unit (1 12) in the data display unit (103) in order to ensure that location of the user entering the data at the moment when s/he shares the data is entered to the system (1) together with data sharing even without being selected by the user and that the data, which are ordered and gathered starting from the most up-to-date share, are viewed by the user entering the data or other users upon they are shared in the system (1) wherein they exist together for a certain period of time synchronously. 2- ) A method (100) according to Claim 1, characterized in that the user who performs data display can view all immediate and synchronous data shared around the location -borders of which are determined by him/her- and/or view immediate and synchronous data related to the interested area by carrying out filtering for the interested data on the basis of keyword and/or time and/or location and/or category by means of the data search and selection unit (12). 3-) A system for determining and sharing data (1) wherein a method (100) according to Claim 1 or 2 is applied, characterized in that it comprises a data search and selection unit (12) including a search and selection unit with time-input (120) and/or a search and selection unit with location-input (121) and/or a search and selection unit with keyword-input (122) and/or a search and selection unit with category-input (123) in order to perform immediate and synchronous search and selection.
